name: Bluedot
description: Bluedots location-precision SDK for geofencing, mobility and retail attribution in APAC.

seo.title: Bluedot — Maps / Geolocation / Routing
seo.meta_description: Bluedot: Bluedots location-precision SDK for geofencing, mobility and retail attribution in APAC.

when_to_use: High-accuracy geofencing for retail visit attribution in APAC
Mobility analytics for understanding customer location patterns
Triggered campaigns when users enter store geofences
Precise location SDK replacing GPS-only geofencing solutions
Location data for transport and logistics fleet management

pros: Precise geofencing beyond native iOS/Android APIs
Strong APAC retail and drive-thru deployments
Proven in quick-service restaurant arrival detection
cons: Narrow use case versus full maps platforms
Apple/Google native APIs closing the gap
SDK adds weight to mobile app bundle
review.verdict: Best-in-class geofencing SDK for retail and curbside; niche but excellent at its job.
review.best_for: Retail and QSR apps needing sub-meter arrival detection
review.not_for: General map apps needing tiles, routing, or geocoding
